---
title: "Monthly Budget Analysis"
description: "A Python project analysing monthly income and expenses."
author: "Serena Emedeke"
date: 2026-04-16
categories: [Python, Data Analysis, Budgeting]
image: /images/budget-project.png
image-alt: "Donut chart showing monthly budget distribution"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
execute:
  engine: jupyter
---

## Overview

This project analyses a simple monthly budget using Python. It demonstrates how financial data can be organised and visualised to better understand spending patterns and support decision-making.

## Objective

The objective of this project is to examine how expenses are distributed across different categories and identify areas of high spending.

## Python Code

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

budget = pd.DataFrame({
    "Category": ["Rent", "Food", "Transport", "Entertainment", "Savings"],
    "Amount": [800, 250, 100, 120, 300]
})

budget

fig = px.pie(
    budget,
    values="Amount",
    names="Category",
    title="Monthly Budget Distribution",
    hole=0.3
)

fig
```
image: ../../images/budget-project.png
